info.title: Automated Course Scheduler API
info.description: API for the Automated Course Scheduler system

post.description: Create a new section in a schedule.

patch.description:
Acquire (or refresh) the lock on this section, then apply the update.

Fails with 423 if another user currently holds the lock.
Broadcasts section_updated to connected clients on success.

delete.description: Delete a section from a schedule.

put.description: Update schedule metadata (name, complete status, etc.).

delete.description: Delete a schedule and all its sections.

get.description: Get all sections for a specific schedule.

schema.title: Response Get Schedule Sections Schedules  Schedule Id  Sections Get

get.description: Get all sections with denormalized course, time block, and instructor data.

schema.title: Response Get Schedule Sections Rich Schedules  Schedule Id  Sections Rich Get

get.description: Export a finalized schedule in CourseLeaf-compatible CSV format.

Get all active locks for a schedule.

Args:
    schedule_id: ID of the schedule to query locks for.
    db: Database session.

Returns:
    List of active locks with user display name included.

schema.title: Response Get Schedule Locks Schedules  Schedule Id  Locks Get

get.description: Get all semesters, with optional filtering by campus, semester name, or year.

schema.title: Response Get All Semesters Semesters Get

put.description: Update semester metadata (name, complete status, etc.).

delete.description: Delete a semester and all its sections.

get.description: Retrieve all courses, optionally filtered by schedule

parameters.name: schedule_id

schema.description: Filter to courses with sections in this schedule
schema.title: Schedule Id

parameters.description: Filter to courses with sections in this schedule

get.description: Retrieve a course by ID with section count.

parameters.name: schedule_id

schema.description: Section count for this schedule only
schema.title: Schedule Id

parameters.description: Section count for this schedule only

delete.description: Delete a course with no sections.

get.description: Retrieve faculty profile with course and time preferences.

patch.description: Partially update faculty demographics and status.

delete.description: Delete a faculty member and their preferences and assignments.

schema.title: Response Build Profiles Faculty Build Profiles Post

get.description: Retrieve all time blocks, optionally filtered by campus.

schema.title: Response Get Time Blocks Time Blocks Get

get.description: Retrieve all campuses, optionally filtered by name.

schema.title: Response Get All Campuses Campuses Get

get.description: Retrieve a specific campus by ID.

post.description: Upload a CSV file containing course offering data.
Upload a CSV file containing faculty preference data.
Upload a CSV file containing faculty time preference data.

schema.title: Response Get Comments Comments  Section Id  Get

post.description:
Acquire a lock on a section for editing.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 403 if the caller does not have the admin role.
    HTTPException: 423 if the section is locked by another user.

Release a lock on a section.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 403 if the caller does not own an active lock.

schema.title: Response Get Schedule Warnings Schedules  Schedule Id  Warnings Get

post.description:
Invite a faculty member. Requires admin role.

Looks up the faculty record by NUID, creates a User, registers them in
Auth0, generates a password-change ticket, and sends an invite email.

get.description:
Return invite links for all active faculty without a linked account.

Creates pending User records for any who were not yet invited.
Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response Export Invites Api Invites Export Get

get.description: Return all users. Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response List Users Api Users Get

get.description: Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Return a single user by ID. Requires admin role.
